articles.title: Trump's Iran gamble divides GOP hawks and 'America First' conservatives over what victory looks like - Fox News
articles.description: Trump's Iran memorandum of understanding divides GOP as hawks like Cassidy and Cruz clash with allies over whether the deal surrenders leverage.
articles.content:
President Donald Trump may have united Republicans behind military action against Iran, but his push to formalize peace is proving far more divisive.

articles.title: Pilot reports passenger bit a fellow flyer on plane approaching Philadelphia: "He's trying to fight everybody" - CBS News
articles.description: An American Airlines passenger allegedly bit a fellow flyer and was "trying to fight everybody" on a Sunday flight, a pilot said.
articles.content:
An unruly passenger apparently bit a fellow flyer on an American Airlines flight as it approached Philadelphia on Sunday, according to the pilot of the plane.

articles.title: 'Running off the cliff': An explosion of household debt has put the US economy in a tough spot - Business Insider
articles.description: Americans are borrowing more and saving less. That's created a major vulnerability in the US economy, SocGen is warning.
articles.content:
America's swelling debt pile bodes ill for the the US economy, Société Générale said.
